S StickerPass · Planning Package
Infinity Page ↗ Read-me
Concept → campaign → Austin beta

The StickerPass planning package.

Twenty-two documents that carry the concept from recovered evidence through decisions to a copy-ready production, funding, and release plan. Every page opens with its heart, shows its story in one picture, then proves it in full.

Healed people heal people. This is a service-first project. Every document below exists so more people can understand it — because the more people who understand it, the more people can help.
Evidence & discoverywhat we found
00 StickerPass Discovery Dossier ≈ 8 min 01 StickerPass Full Interview Workbook ≈ 19 min 02 Asset Review Manifest ≈ 4 min 03 Deliverable Gate Map ≈ 2 min 04 Current Environment and Tool Audit ≈ 5 min 05 Crowdfunding Readiness Audit ≈ 9 min 06 Required Skills Readiness Matrix ≈ 8 min 07 Source Recovery and Review Log ≈ 4 min
Decisionswhat we chose
08 StickerPass Interview Answer Sheet ≈ 5 min 09 StickerPass Decision Register ≈ 8 min 10 Final Concept-to-Production Package Schema ≈ 6 min 11 StickerPass Crowdfunding Offer Option Menu ≈ 7 min
The production planwhat we build
12 Pre-Design Review (PDR) ≈ 5 min 13 Project Scope ≈ 6 min 14 Technical Requirements Specification ≈ 7 min 15 Recommended Tech Stack ≈ 5 min 16 Required Assets ≈ 5 min 17 Platforms, Subscriptions, and Services ≈ 4 min 18 Crowdfunding Strategy: Full Landscape, Decision Framework, and Campaign Plan ≈ 19 min 19 Required Tools, Installation, Setup, Skills, and Training ≈ 5 min 20 Concept-to-Beta Implementation Roadmap ≈ 4 min 21 Traceability and Consistency Matrix ≈ 4 min
Markdown sources live beside these pages — edit .md, then run node build-html.mjs Open the Infinity Page ↗
